description: Discussion on the development of Cube, a decentralized exchange aimed at addressing issues faced by centralized exchanges, particularly in the wake of the FTX incident. The speaker outlines the challenges of self-custody and liquidity, and introduces a multi-party computation (MPC) vault for secure token management.
topic_summary: The speaker reflects on the evolution of Cube, emphasizing the need for secure self-custody solutions and improved liquidity in decentralized exchanges, while detailing the architecture of their trading platform and its advantages over traditional exchanges [t=4:72-456:41].
